title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex CASE statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value1 Int32, value2 Int32, value3 Int32 DEFAULT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (value1, value2) VALUES (NULL, 10), (20, NULL), (30, 40);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, score Float32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, score) VALUES (1, 95.5), (2, NULL), (3, 88.0);
SELECT IF(value1 IS NULL, (SELECT AVG(score) FROM another_table WHERE ref_id = test_table.id), value1) AS result FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Complex CASE statement with nested functions and NULL handling
